texto: On January 24th, Apple computers will introduce Macintosh. And you’ll see why 1984 won’t be like 1984.” – Old Hollywood film director Sir Ridley Scott’s classic “1984” Apple Macintosh commercial, first aired 15 Dec. 1983, Top Ten Commercials of All Time, 2050 edition“Well, it all did lead to 1984.” – Goli, the tek-lord, 2089
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Austin Dragon: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “On January 24th, Apple computers will introduce Macintosh. And you’ll see why 1984 won’t be like …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que lideranca, dystopian-thriller, science-fiction pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de science-fiction.
